title: Operation Architect
learning_objectives: Design a complete red team engagement methodology
Document red team scope, rules of engagement, and objectives
Create engagement timeline and checkpoint framework
Develop incident response capabilities for testing
key_topics: Red team engagement planning and scoping
scenario: Scenario AfriBank Group, a pan-African financial institution in Nairobi with branches in 6 countries, has commissioned a red team engagement. The board wants to know if a nation-state-level threat actor could access their SWIFT payment systems. Design the complete operation. Subtasks Scoring Rubric Linked Recipes: RA01, RA02 ________________________________________________________________________________

scenario_context.setting: Nairobi, Kenya, pan-African financial services group
scenario_context.challenge: Design red team methodology and infrastructure for testing pan-African financial services group's Nairobi, Kenya operations
scenario_context.relevance: Reflects real-world African enterprise security challenges and red team operations across the continent

subtasks.title: Threat Profile Development
subtasks.description: Research relevant APT TTPs. Map to MITRE ATT&CK.
subtasks.evidence: Threat actor profile with ATT&CK mapping
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Begin by thoroughly reviewing the scenario and understanding all objectives. Document your approach before execution. This is the foundational subtask that enables all following work.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed
subtasks.evidence_required: Threat actor profile with ATT&CK mapping

subtasks.title: Crown Jewel Analysis
subtasks.description: Identify critical assets. Map access paths to SWIFT systems.
subtasks.evidence: Crown jewel analysis with access path diagrams
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Conduct systematic reconnaissance and information gathering. Map the target network, identify services, and document all findings with evidence.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed
subtasks.evidence_required: Crown jewel analysis with access path diagrams

subtasks.title: Operational Plan
subtasks.description: Complete red team plan: phases, timelines, TTPs, success criteria.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Analyze vulnerabilities discovered in reconnaissance. Validate each vulnerability through testing and document the exploitation path.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: Rules of Engagement
subtasks.description: Draft comprehensive ROE covering scope, deconfliction, emergency.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Execute the exploitation with careful attention to OPSEC and evasion. Maintain detailed logs of all actions for evidence and reporting.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

subtasks.title: Infrastructure Plan
subtasks.description: C2 architecture: redirectors, domain fronting, OPSEC.
subtasks.evidence: C2 infrastructure design with network diagrams
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Establish persistence mechanisms that survive system reboots and will maintain access throughout the engagement.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed
subtasks.evidence_required: C2 infrastructure design with network diagrams

subtasks.title: Operator Playbook
subtasks.description: Procedures for each kill chain phase with abort criteria.
subtasks.detailed_guidance:
Perform privilege escalation and lateral movement to achieve the mission objectives. Document each pivot point.

Specific to this mission:
- Follow all engagement rules of engagement
- Maintain OPSEC throughout execution
- Collect evidence of all activities
- Document findings for client reporting
- Coordinate with engagement lead and blue team as needed

resources: OCH Advanced Red Team Operations Toolkit

quiz.question: What is the primary purpose of defining Rules of Engagement (RoE) in a red team engagement?
options: To restrict the red team from using certain techniques
To establish boundaries and prevent unintended impact on the target organization
To limit the client from interfering with the engagement
To document historical red team activities
quiz.explanation: RoE establish boundaries and constraints to prevent unintended business impact while allowing necessary testing.

quiz.question: Which of the following is a critical component of red team OPSEC?
options: Sharing all findings immediately with the target organization
Using primary team credentials for all activities
Maintaining compartmentalization between red team members and blue team
Documenting all activities in plain text email
quiz.explanation: OPSEC requires compartmentalization to prevent red team capabilities from being revealed to defenders.

mentor_notes: For OA-M01 - Operation Architect: Ensure learner demonstrates proper OPSEC, evidence collection, and professional reporting. This mission is designed to build red team operations expertise. Coordinate with blue team for detection validation where applicable.
